title: taraxacum grootii
intro: Taraxacum grootii, also known as the Groot's dandelion, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion genus, characterized by its bright yellow flowers and jagged leaves. The plant is used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Taraxacum grootii include its ability to support liver and kidney function, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and improve digestion. Taraxacum grootii is typically prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and can also be consumed as a juice or added to herbal supplements.
